theme: codec-conditioned dynamic compute for multimodal world modeling and control

now.title: Full wall-clock instrumentation
now.goal: Measure decode, classification, resize/colorspace, vision, prefill, and generation separately.

now.title: Codec metadata integration
now.goal: Compare pixel diff versus motion vectors/residual proxies versus hybrid novelty signals.

now.title: Sparse window recompute
now.goal: Skip encoder work for unchanged windows instead of only swapping outputs.

now.title: Changed-query attention prototype
now.goal: Make changed tokens query broadly while static tokens use memory or local-only paths.

now.title: Stabilization for ego-motion
now.goal: Align camera motion before same-position caching.

now.title: Task-aware media sweeps
now.goal: Test grayscale, low-res, mixed-res ROI, and color-protect policies.

now.title: Robustness suite
now.goal: Stress deadline stability under novelty bursts, blur, flicker, scene cuts, and sensor desync.

next.title: Screen-content fork
next.goal: Add UI/code/slides-specific policies using copy- and palette-like priors.

next.title: Multi-reference and B-frame-aware caching
next.goal: Cache against multiple prior references instead of single-hop previous-frame only.

next.title: Sensor-fusion timeline
next.goal: Add timestamps, IMU, pose, depth, or event streams as first-class cache alignment inputs.

next.title: Learned refresh gate
next.goal: Train a tiny uncertainty gate on top of heuristic novelty masks.

later.title: Machine-oriented codec sidecar
later.goal: Emit novelty masks, motion uncertainty, ROI hints, and timestamps alongside standard bitstreams.

later.title: AI-native codec
later.goal: Design a machine-first codec optimized for model utility per joule rather than only human fidelity per bit.

later.title: Hardware co-design
later.goal: Map active tiles and tensor-friendly decode primitives to future NPU/GPU/video blocks.

later.title: Layered world-state stream
later.goal: Represent scenes as persistent static layers plus dynamic event/object updates with explicit timing.
